headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Hilton Worldwide Holdings, Raises Price Target to $379
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Trey Bowers   maintains Hilton Worldwide Holdings (NYSE:HLT) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $376 to $379.
